008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.response;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
025
026/**
027 * Default immutable implementation of {@link HttpStatusLine}.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Create instances via the static factory methods:
031 * <p class='bjava'>
032 *    <jc>// 200 OK  HTTP/1.1</jc>
033 *    HttpStatusLine <jv>sl</jv> = HttpStatusLineBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(200, <js>"OK"</js>);
034 *
035 *    <jc>// Custom protocol version (parsed)</jc>
036 *    HttpStatusLine <jv>sl2</jv> = HttpStatusLineBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"HTTP/2"</js>, 200, <js>"OK"</js>);
037 *
038 *    <jc>// Custom protocol version (typed)</jc>
039 *    HttpStatusLine <jv>sl3</jv> = HttpStatusLineBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(HttpProtocolVersion.<jsf>HTTP_2_0</jsf>, 200, <js>"OK"</js>);
040 * </p>
041 *
042 * <p>
043 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
044 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
045 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
046 * (and possibly earlier).
047 * For production use cases that require long-term binary stability, continue using the existing
048 * {@code juneau-rest-client} and {@code juneau-rest-common} APIs until the {@code ng} stack is declared stable.
049 *
050 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
051 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
052 * </ul>
053 *
054 * @since 9.2.1
055 */
056public final class HttpStatusLineBean implements HttpStatusLine {
057
058   private final HttpProtocolVersion protocolVersion;
059   private final int statusCode;
060   private final String reasonPhrase;
061
062   private HttpStatusLineBean(HttpProtocolVersion protocolVersion, int statusCode, String reasonPhrase) {
063      this.protocolVersion = assertArgNotNull("protocolVersion", protocolVersion);
064      this.statusCode = statusCode;
065      this.reasonPhrase = reasonPhrase;
066   }
067
068   /**
069    * Creates an {@code HTTP/1.1} status line with the given status code and reason phrase.
070    *
071    * @param statusCode The HTTP status code (e.g. {@code 200}).
072    * @param reasonPhrase The reason phrase (e.g. {@code "OK"}). May be <jk>null</jk>.
073    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
074    */
075   public static HttpStatusLineBean of(int statusCode, String reasonPhrase) {
076      return new HttpStatusLineBean(HttpProtocolVersion.HTTP_1_1, statusCode, reasonPhrase);
077   }
078
079   /**
080    * Creates a status line with a parsed protocol version, status code, and reason phrase.
081    *
082    * @param protocolVersion The protocol version string (e.g. {@code "HTTP/2"}). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
083    * @param statusCode The HTTP status code.
084    * @param reasonPhrase The reason phrase. May be <jk>null</jk>.
085    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
086    */
087   public static HttpStatusLineBean of(String protocolVersion, int statusCode, String reasonPhrase) {
088      return new HttpStatusLineBean(HttpProtocolVersion.parse(protocolVersion), statusCode, reasonPhrase);
089   }
090
091   /**
092    * Creates a status line with the given typed protocol version, status code, and reason phrase.
093    *
094    * @param protocolVersion The protocol version. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
095    * @param statusCode The HTTP status code.
096    * @param reasonPhrase The reason phrase. May be <jk>null</jk>.
097    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
098    */
099   public static HttpStatusLineBean of(HttpProtocolVersion protocolVersion, int statusCode, String reasonPhrase) {
100      return new HttpStatusLineBean(protocolVersion, statusCode, reasonPhrase);
101   }
102
103   @Override /* HttpStatusLine */
104   public int getStatusCode() {
105      return statusCode;
106   }
107
108   @Override /* HttpStatusLine */
109   public String getReasonPhrase() {
110      return reasonPhrase;
111   }
112
113   @Override /* HttpStatusLine */
114   public HttpProtocolVersion getProtocolVersion() {
115      return protocolVersion;
116   }
117
118   @Override /* Object */
119   public String toString() {
120      var sb = new StringBuilder(protocolVersion.toString()).append(' ').append(statusCode);
121      if (reasonPhrase != null)
122         sb.append(' ').append(reasonPhrase);
123      return sb.toString();
124   }
125
126   @Override /* Object */
127   public boolean equals(Object obj) {
128      return (obj instanceof HttpStatusLineBean o2) && eq(this, o2, (x, y) ->
129         x.statusCode == y.statusCode && eq(x.protocolVersion, y.protocolVersion) && eq(x.reasonPhrase, y.reasonPhrase));
130   }
131
132   @Override /* Object */
133   public int hashCode() {
134      return Objects.hash(protocolVersion, statusCode, reasonPhrase);
135   }
136}
